description_long: This is a dark green armored combat vehicle with a low, angular hull and a prominent, elongated cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, protected by side skirts, and a flat, sloped front glacis for deflecting projectiles. The turret is equipped with a secondary machine gun mount and various hatches, periscopes, and observation devices. The rear of the vehicle is slightly raised, and the overall design emphasizes heavy armor and a streamlined silhouette. The surface appears matte and robust, with no visible markings or camouflage patterns. The vehicle is designed for urban and battlefield environments, providing both offensive and defensive capabilities.
description: A dark green armored combat vehicle with a long cannon, six road wheels per side, and a matte, angular hull. The turret features a secondary machine gun and multiple hatches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped glacis, central cannon, and the angular hull shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the six large road wheels, side skirts, and the full length of the cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, rear hull, and the symmetrical track layout.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wheels, side armor, and turret-mounted machine gun.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front and one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and angular surfaces, appearing thick and robust, especially at the front and turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color, no visible camouflage pattern.
